question: Transformer T-018 has a sudden hydrogen increase relative to baseline. Determine the likely root cause class and recommend one confirmatory measurement.
answer: Based on the sensor readings, the likely root cause class is Arc Discharge (FM-006). The recommended confirmatory measurement is the Acetylene (C2H2) gas partial pressure.
